subclassFeature.name: Circle of Flowers
entries: You learn additional spells when you reach certain levels in this class, as shown on the table below. Each of these spells counts as a druid spell for you, but it doesn't count against the number of druid spells you have prepared.

subclassFeature.name: Floral Form
entries: As a {@variantrule Bonus Action|Ishiir}, you can spend one use of your Wild Shape to transform into a floral shape. Choose one of the following Reproduction types (Seed, Bulb, Rootstalk, Pollen). Depending on your choice, you gain the following benefits for 10 minutes:

entries.caption: Reproduction Effects
rows: While in this form you can plant a seed as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|Ishiir} up to 5ft away from you. You can plant an amount of seeds up to your {@variantrule Proficiency|Ishiir}. Once a seed is planted it grows into a tiny flower creature with 1hp, an AC of 10 and a movement speed of 0. These creatures take their turn immediately after yours and the only {@variantrule Action|Ishiir} they can take is Shoot Seed. This attack uses your spell casting modifier and your {@variantrule Proficiency|Ishiir} to hit and deals {@damage 1d4} piercing damage on a hit and has a range of 40ft.
While in this form you gain {@variantrule Resistance|Ishiir} to Poison damage, in addition you increase your Max HP by thrice your Druid level for the duration of this form.

While in this form you exude roots into the ground below or slither over it in a 15ft radius, making this area {@quickref difficult terrain||3}. An hostile creature that is large or smaller that enter or starts their turn in this radius must make a Strength {@variantrule Saving Throw|Ishiir} against your spell save DC or be {@condition Grappled|Ishiir} by the vines.

While in this form you exude a constant stream of pollen in a 15ft radius around you. You can use touch spells on any creature within this radius as if you were in a space next to them. In addition, when you deal damage or restore hit points with a touch spell, the target takes additional damage or regains additional hit points equal to your {@variantrule Proficiency|Ishiir} bonus.

subclassFeature.name: Dendrologogy
entries: As your connection with flowers deepens, you take on more plant-like traits. You are always under the effect of the {@spell Barkskin|Ishiir} spell.
Additionally, when you cast {@spell Barkskin|Ishiir} with a spell slot, the spell counts as 1 level higher. You can also speak with plants as if they were animated by a speak with plants spell.

subclassFeature.name: Flower Circle
entries: Your connection with flowers lets you summon them from the earth to soothe yourself and your companions. During a {@variantrule Short Rest|Ishiir}, you can cause an area of flowers to bloom on the ground in a 15-foot radius centered on you that lasts for 1 hour, until you become {@condition Incapacitated|Ishiir}, or you leave the circle.
Creatures of your choice within the area gain the following benefits:

items: When they regain hit points by spending hit dice or with magic, they regain additional hit points equal to your {@variantrule Proficiency|Ishiir} bonus. Creatures can only benefit from this once per {@variantrule Short Rest|Ishiir}.

If they spend the full rest within the circle, they gain {@variantrule Resistance|Ishiir} to Poison damage for 24 hours. Once you have used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|Ishiir} or you spend 2 charges of your wildshape feature to regain a use.

subclassFeature.name: Full Bloom
entries: Your Floral form strengthens and you gain new benefits depending on your Reproduction type.

entries.caption: Reproduction Effects
rows: Your flower creatures now add your Wisdom modifier to the damage and you can plant seeds up to 15ft away.

Your body is able to protect itself with multiple layers. When a creature hits you with an attack, you can use your {@variantrule Reaction|Ishiir} to roll a d6. On a 5 or higher, the attack misses regardless of the roll.

Your roots expand to 30ft radius around you and you can now {@condition Grappled|Ishiir|Grapple} up to huge creatures. In addition, you can now use a {@variantrule Bonus Action|Ishiir} on a creature {@condition Grappled|Ishiir} by your vines to force them to make a Strength {@variantrule Saving Throw|Ishiir}. On a failurem they become {@condition Restrained|Ishiir} and {@condition Grappled|Ishiir}.

Your pollen now spreads in a 30ft radius around you. In addition, when you hit a creature with a touch spell once per transformation, you can target a second creature within your pollen with the same spell using the same attack roll if applicable.
